gate.title: Welcome to CodeTrek
gate.subtitle: One account for the whole household — sign in on any device to pick up where you left off.

errors.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-24 characters (letters, numbers, _ or -).
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong — check your details and try again.

offlineNotice: Couldn't reach the account server — playing in offline mode with what's saved on this device.

account.title: Account
account.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently deletes this account and every profile's progress on the server. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteAccountConfirm: Delete your account and all progress? This cannot be undone.
